SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.io.vsam

Class AbstractSqlApi

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.io.vsam.AbstractSqlApi
All Implemented Interfaces:
ICatalogApi, IVsamApi
Direct Known Subclasses:
Db2SqlApi, H2SqlApi, MsSqlApi, MySqlApi, PgSqlApi
public abstract class AbstractSqlApi extends Object implements IVsamApi, ICatalogApi

    alterCluster(FileDescriptor oldFd, FileDescriptor newFd)

    • open

      public void open(OpenMode openMode, LockMode lockMode) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Opens the VSAM file with the specified open mode and lock mode.
      Specified by:
      open in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      openMode - the mode in which the file should be opened (e.g., Input, Output)
      lockMode - the lock mode to apply when opening the file
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while opening the file

    • truncate

      protected void truncate()

    • read

      public int read(KsdsKey keyDef, byte[] keyValue, byte[] recordBuffer, KeyIs mode, boolean update)
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Reads a record from the VSAM file using the specified key definition, key value, and read mode.
      Specified by:
      read in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      keyDef - the key definition used for reading
      keyValue - the key value to search for
      recordBuffer - the buffer to store the read record
      mode - the read mode (e.g., EQUAL, GTEQ, NEXT)
      update - true if the record should be updated after reading, false otherwise
      Returns:
      the number of bytes read

    • read

      public int read(Rrn rrn, byte[] recordBuffer, KeyIs mode, boolean update)
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Reads a record from the VSAM file using the specified Relative Record Number (RRN) and read mode.
      Specified by:
      read in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      rrn - the Relative Record Number (RRN) of the record to read
      recordBuffer - the buffer to store the read record
      mode - the read mode (e.g., EQUAL, GTEQ, NEXT)
      update - true if the record should be updated after reading, false otherwise
      Returns:
      the number of bytes read

    • read

      public int read(Rba rba, byte[] recordBuffer, KeyIs mode, boolean update)
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Reads a record from the VSAM file using the specified Relative Buffer Address (RBA) and read mode.
      Specified by:
      read in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      rba - the Relative Buffer Address (RBA) of the record to read
      recordBuffer - the buffer to store the read record
      mode - the read mode (e.g., EQUAL, GTEQ, NEXT)
      update - true if the record should be updated after reading, false otherwise
      Returns:
      the number of bytes read

      Specified by:

      keyDef - the key definition used for rewriting

    • delete

      public int delete(KsdsKey keyDef, byte[] keyValue, boolean generic) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Deletes a record from the VSAM file based on the specified key definition and key value.
      Specified by:
      delete in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      keyDef - the key definition used for deletion
      keyValue - the key value of the record to delete
      generic - true if the deletion should be generic (delete all matching records), false otherwise
      Returns:
      the number of records deleted
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while deleting the record

      Specified by:

      rrn - the Relative Record Number (RRN) of the record to delete
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while deleting the record

    • defineCluster

      public void defineCluster(FileDescriptor fd) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Defines a cluster for the given file descriptor.
      Specified by:
      defineCluster in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      fd - the file descriptor representing the VSAM file
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while defining the cluster

    • defineAix

      public void defineAix(FileDescriptor fd, KsdsKey keyDef, boolean rebuildIndexes) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Defines an Alternate Index (AIX) for the specified file descriptor using the provided key definition.

      The AIX allows for efficient access to records in a Key Sequenced Data Set (KSDS) file based on an alternate key.

      Specified by:
      defineAix in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      fd - the file descriptor representing the VSAM file
      keyDef - the key definition for the AIX
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while defining the AIX

    • deleteAix

      public void deleteAix(FileDescriptor fd) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Deletes the Alternate Index (AIX) associated with the specified file descriptor.
      Specified by:
      deleteAix in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      fd - the file descriptor representing the VSAM file
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while deleting the AIX

    • rebuildIndexes

      public void rebuildIndexes(FileDescriptor fd)
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Rebuilds the indexes associated with the specified VSAM file.

      This operation reconstructs the indexes for the VSAM file, which can help optimize access and improve performance.

      Specified by:
      rebuildIndexes in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      fd - the file descriptor representing the VSAM file

    • alterCluster

      public void alterCluster(FileDescriptor oldFd, FileDescriptor newFd) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Alters the cluster associated with the old file descriptor to match the configuration specified in the new file descriptor.

      This operation updates the VSAM cluster's attributes, such as the allocation parameters, data set name, and key structure, to match the configuration specified in the new file descriptor.

      Specified by:
      alterCluster in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      oldFd - the old file descriptor representing the existing VSAM cluster
      newFd - the new file descriptor representing the desired VSAM cluster configuration
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while altering the cluster

    • buildAlterClusterSql

      protected String buildAlterClusterSql(FileDescriptor oldFd, FileDescriptor newFd)

    • buildDeleteClusterSql

      protected String buildDeleteClusterSql(FileDescriptor fd)

    • deleteCluster

      public void deleteCluster(FileDescriptor fd) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Deletes the cluster associated with the specified file descriptor.

      This operation removes the entire VSAM cluster, including all data sets and indexes associated with it.

      Specified by:
      deleteCluster in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      fd - the file descriptor representing the VSAM file
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while deleting the cluster

    • initializeCatalog

      public void initializeCatalog(boolean create) throws CatalogException
      Description copied from interface: ICatalogApi
      Initializes the catalog.
      Specified by:
      initializeCatalog in interface ICatalogApi
      Parameters:
      create - Flag indicating whether to create the catalog if it doesn't exist.
      Throws:
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during catalog initialization.

      protected void createCatalog() throws CatalogException
      Throws:
      CatalogException

    • storeCatalogEntry

      public void storeCatalogEntry(FileDescriptor fd) throws DuplicatedCatalogEntryException, CatalogException
      Description copied from interface: ICatalogApi
      Stores a catalog entry.
      Specified by:
      storeCatalogEntry in interface ICatalogApi
      Parameters:
      fd - The FileDescriptor representing the catalog entry to be stored.
      Throws:
      DuplicatedCatalogEntryException - If a duplicate catalog entry is encountered.
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during catalog entry storage.

    • retrieveCatalogEntry

      public FileDescriptor retrieveCatalogEntry(String dsn) throws CatalogEntryNotFoundException, CatalogException
      Description copied from interface: ICatalogApi
      Retrieves a catalog entry based on the dataset name (dsn).
      Specified by:
      retrieveCatalogEntry in interface ICatalogApi
      Parameters:
      dsn - The dataset name to retrieve the catalog entry for.
      Returns:
      The FileDescriptor representing the retrieved catalog entry.
      Throws:
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry for the specified dataset name is not found.
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during catalog entry retrieval.

    • retrieveCatalogEntry

      public FileDescriptor retrieveCatalogEntry(String dsn, String catalog) throws CatalogEntryNotFoundException, CatalogException
      Description copied from interface: ICatalogApi
      Retrieves a catalog entry based on the dataset name (dsn) and catalog name.
      Specified by:
      retrieveCatalogEntry in interface ICatalogApi
      Parameters:
      dsn - The dataset name to retrieve the catalog entry for.
      catalog - The name of the catalog to search for the entry in.
      Returns:
      The FileDescriptor representing the retrieved catalog entry.
      Throws:
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry for the specified dataset name is not found.
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during catalog entry retrieval.

    • listCatalogEntries

      public List<FileDescriptor> listCatalogEntries(String dsn, String catalog) throws CatalogException, CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      Description copied from interface: ICatalogApi
      Lists catalog entries based on the dataset name and catalog name.
      Specified by:
      listCatalogEntries in interface ICatalogApi
      Parameters:
      dsn - The dataset name to list catalog entries for.
      catalog - The name of the catalog to search for entries in.
      Returns:
      A list of FileDescriptors representing the catalog entries.
      Throws:
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during catalog entry listing.
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry for the specified dataset name is not found.

      public LinkedList<FileDescriptor> listRelatedEntries(String dsn) throws CatalogException, CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      Description copied from interface: ICatalogApi
      Lists related entries based on the specified dataset name.
      Specified by:
      listRelatedEntries in interface ICatalogApi
      Parameters:
      dsn - The dataset name to list related entries for.
      Returns:
      A linked list of FileDescriptors representing the related entries.
      Throws:
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during related entry listing.
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry for the specified dataset name is not found.

      public LinkedList<FileDescriptor> retrieveLinkedEntries(String dsn) throws CatalogException, CatalogEntryNotFoundException
      Description copied from interface: ICatalogApi
      Retrieves linked entries related to the specified dataset name.
      Specified by:
      retrieveLinkedEntries in interface ICatalogApi
      Parameters:
      dsn - The dataset name to retrieve linked entries for.
      Returns:
      A linked list of FileDescriptors representing the related entries.
      Throws:

      Parameters:

      public int count(FileDescriptor fd) throws CatalogException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Returns the count of records in the VSAM file represented by the given file descriptor.
      Specified by:
      count in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      fd - the file descriptor representing the VSAM file

    • existsCatalogEntry

      public boolean existsCatalogEntry(String dsn, String catalog) throws CatalogException
      Description copied from interface: ICatalogApi
      Checks if a catalog entry exists for the specified dataset name and catalog name.
      Specified by:
      existsCatalogEntry in interface ICatalogApi
      Parameters:
      dsn - The dataset name to check for the catalog entry.
      catalog - The name of the catalog to search for the entry in.
      Returns:
      True if the catalog entry exists, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      CatalogException - If an error occurs during catalog entry existence check.

      Description copied from interface: ICatalogApi
      Updates a catalog entry.

      updateCatalogEntry in interface ICatalogApi
      Parameters:
      fd - The FileDescriptor representing the catalog entry to update.
      Throws:
      CatalogEntryNotFoundException - If the catalog entry to be updated is not found.

    • exportData

      public long exportData(SequentialFile outfile, boolean append, int batchSize) throws FileIOException
      Description copied from interface: IVsamApi
      Exports the contents of the VSAM file to the specified Sequential File.
      Specified by:
      exportData in interface IVsamApi
      Parameters:
      outfile - the Sequential File to export the contents to
      append - if true, append data to the file
      batchSize - the size of the export batch (in rows)
      Returns:
      the number of records exported
      Throws:
      FileIOException - if an I/O error occurs while exporting the contents

      Imports the contents of a sequential file into VSAM file.

      importData in interface IVsamApi

      batchSize - the size of the batch JDBC operation

      FileIOException

    • buildTableExistsSql

      protected abstract String buildTableExistsSql(String schema, String table)
